# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [1.2.0] - 2026-03-15

### Added
- New user dashboard with analytics widgets
- Export to PDF functionality
- Dark mode support

### Fixed
- Login timeout issue on slow connections
- CSV export encoding for special characters

### Changed
- Upgraded Node.js from 18 to 22
- Migrated from Jest to Vitest

## [1.1.0] - 2026-02-01

### Added
- User profile page
- Email notifications for team invites

### Fixed
- Memory leak in WebSocket handler

## [1.0.0] - 2026-01-10

### Added
- Initial release
- User authentication with OAuth
- Team management
- REST API with OpenAPI docs
